name: technical-analysis
description: John J. Murphy's definitive textbook on technical analysis — trend analysis, chart patterns, oscillators, moving averages, volume analysis, Elliott Wave, intermarket analysis, and money management.
useCase: Identifying market trends, recognizing reversal and continuation patterns, using oscillators and indicators, applying intermarket analysis, managing trade risk and position sizing.
knownRisks: This is a comprehensive textbook — it covers a vast amount of material; users may need guidance on where to start
Some specific techniques (Point and Figure, Elliott Wave) are controversial and not universally accepted
Technical analysis is probabilistic, not deterministic — no pattern guarantees a result
The book was published in 1999 — some specific examples and technologies are dated
